block_18: Most Profitable Trade of the Week
block_44: Warren Buffett started investing at the age of 11. He bought six shares of Cities Service on the stock exchange at $38 per share: three for himself and three for his sister Doris. After the stock dropped to $27 and then soared to $40, Warren and Doris sold their shares and made a good profit.
